'''Blue Squadron''' was the name of a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]-aligned [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] in operation prior to and during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. The [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] of Blue Squadron flew mainly [[A-6 Interceptor|A-6]] and [[Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|Delta-7 ''Aethersprite''-class light]] [[Interceptor/Legends|interceptors]].

==History==
===Jedi Aces===
In [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]], the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] Blue Squadron was sent into [[Fifth Battle of Qotile|battle]] during the [[Stark Hyperspace War/Legends|Stark Hyperspace War]], and was led alongside [[Red Squadron (Galactic Republic)/Legends|Red Squadron]] by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Saesee Tiin/Legends|Saesee Tiin]].<ref name="SW39" /> At this time, the [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] consisted of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]-[[Pilot/Legends|piloted]] [[A-6 Interceptor]]s.<ref name="TEGTW" />

During the [[First Battle of Kamino|Battle of Kamino]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], early in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] and prior to the development of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]]-oriented [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]], the Jedi of Blue Squadron flew [[Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|Delta-7 ''Aethersprite''-class light interceptor]] under the command of [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] under the [[Callsign/Legends|call sign]] . The squadron was tasked with protecting [[Tipoca City/Legends|Tipoca City]] from any [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[C-9979 landing craft/Legends|C-9979 landing craft]] that penetrated [[Red Squadron (Galactic Republic)/Legends|Red Squadron's]] defense. General Kenobi was shot down over the ocean by a [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|droid starfighter]], and was rescued from enemy fighters and local fauna by the intervention of his [[Padawan/Legends|padawan]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Kaminoan/Legends|Kaminoan]] [[Cloning/Legends|cloner]] [[Taun We/Legends|Taun We]]. Their starfighters damaged in the process, the two Jedi returned to Tipoca City to battle the invasion forces on foot.<ref name="Republic50" />

===Grand Army of the Republic===
{{Main|Blue Squadron (Galactic Republic)/Legends}}
Later in the Clone Wars, [[Clone trooper pilot/Legends|clone trooper pilots]] flying [[V-19 Torrent starfighter/Legends|V-19 Torrent starfighters]] were integrated into [[Blue Squadron (Galactic Republic)/Legends|Blue Squadron]], although Jedi pilots would on occasion take command of the unit.<ref name="SoR">{{TCW|Storm Over Ryloth}}</ref>
